events.name: Houston Rockets at Oklahoma City Thunder

highlights.headline: Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller
highlights.description: The Thunder prevail on ring night with a hard-fought victory over the Rockets in double overtime.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller) 2025/10/21 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: — Thunder fans got everything they wanted on Tuesday — a ring ceremony, a championship banner unveiling and a win over ex-Oklahoma City star Kevin Durant and the Houston Rockets.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thunder celebrate ring ceremony, banner unveiling and double-OT win over Durant's Rockets

video.headline: Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Thunder, Rockets open NBA season with 2OT thriller) 2025/10/21 ESHEET SOTFULL

events.name: Golden State Warriors at Los Angeles Lakers

highlights.headline: Golden State Warriors vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights
highlights.description: Golden State Warriors vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Golden State Warriors vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/22 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Jimmy Butler scored 31 points, Stephen Curry added 23 and the Golden State Warriors overcame Luka Doncic’s 43-point performance to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 119-109 on Tuesday night in both teams' season opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka scores 43, but Butler's Warriors top Lakers 119-109 in a LeBron-less season opener

video.headline: Golden State Warriors vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Golden State Warriors vs. Los Angeles Lakers: Game Highlights) 2025/10/22 ESHEET
